presentation-quality.requirement: Uses precise options terminology (delta, IV rank, theta decay, Greeks) without over-explaining basic concepts to intermediate traders

presentation-quality.requirement: Maintains objective analytical tone focusing on risk metrics and probability calculations
presentation-quality.explanation: The response maintains an objective, report-like tone and repeatedly quantifies risk using explicit metrics (max loss %, delta-based POP estimates, expected value, binomial probabilities, standard deviation, Sharpe, Kelly, and risk-of-ruin).
